title: What SynapEscrow Is
content: SynapEscrow is a freelance project platform that helps employers and freelancers work together using milestone-based escrow. It combines project posting, proposals, milestone tracking, protected payments, and dispute guidance in one workflow.

title: Main Platform Features
questions: what are the main features of this website
what can i do on this platform
content: SynapEscrow lets employers post projects, receive freelancer proposals, split work into milestones, fund milestones in escrow, review deliverables, release payments after approval, track activity in dashboards, and follow dispute support guidance if something goes wrong.

title: Why Use SynapEscrow
questions: what are the benefits of synapescrow
content: SynapEscrow reduces payment uncertainty by protecting milestone funds in escrow and keeping deliverables tied to clear acceptance steps. It gives both employers and freelancers more structure around scope, progress tracking, verification, and payment release.

title: How Escrow Works
questions: what happens to funds before work starts
content: In SynapEscrow, the employer funds a milestone before work begins and the money is held in escrow while the freelancer completes that step. The funds stay protected until the milestone is reviewed and approved through the platform workflow.

title: How Milestones Work
questions: how are projects split into milestones
content: SynapEscrow breaks a project into milestones so each stage has a deliverable, timeline, and payout amount or percentage. This makes project scope clearer and lets payment release happen step by step instead of waiting until the entire project is finished.

title: Creating Milestones
questions: how do i create a milestone
how should milestones be set up
what should i include in a milestone
content: When creating milestones in SynapEscrow, define a clear milestone title, expected deliverable, acceptance criteria, timeline, and payout amount or percentage. The milestone plan should cover the whole project cleanly so progress and payment are easy to review.

title: Freelancer Login
questions: how can i login as a freelancer
how do i log in as freelancer
how can a freelancer access the dashboard
content: A freelancer logs in from the SynapEscrow sign-in page using the email and password used for the account. After signing in, SynapEscrow takes the user to the freelancer dashboard to manage proposals, projects, and milestone progress.

title: Employer Login
questions: how can i login as an employer
how can an employer access the dashboard
content: An employer signs in from the SynapEscrow login page with the account email and password. After login, the employer dashboard is where projects can be posted, proposals reviewed, milestones funded, and releases managed.

title: Signup Flow
questions: how can i create an account
content: New users create a SynapEscrow account from the signup page by entering their account details and choosing the appropriate role. After registration, they can sign in and continue to the dashboard experience for that role.

title: Dashboards
questions: what can employers and freelancers see after login
content: SynapEscrow has role-based dashboards. Employers use their dashboard to manage projects, review proposals, fund milestones, and release payments, while freelancers use their dashboard to track proposals, active projects, submissions, and milestone status.

title: Payment Release
questions: how do milestone payments get released
content: Payment is released after a funded milestone is completed, reviewed, and approved in the SynapEscrow workflow. The employer checks the deliverable, and the release happens only after the required platform approval or verification step is satisfied.

title: Disputes
questions: what happens if there is a dispute
what if employer and freelancer disagree
how do i get help with a milestone issue
content: If there is a dispute about milestone quality, scope, or payment release, users should follow the SynapEscrow dispute process and contact support for review. SynapBot can explain the workflow, but final dispute handling depends on the platform's review process.

title: Employer and Freelancer Roles
questions: what is the difference between employer and freelancer
content: Employers create projects, review proposals, fund milestones, and approve releases. Freelancers submit proposals, complete milestone deliverables, and track project progress from their own dashboard.

title: Verification Before Release
questions: does synapescrow verify work before release
what happens before payment is approved
content: SynapEscrow includes a verification step to help review submitted milestone work before payment release. That guidance supports the employer's approval decision, but payment still follows the platform workflow rather than an automatic promise from the bot.

title: Freelancer Ranking and Matching
content: SynapEscrow includes a ranking flow that helps surface freelancers using signals such as profile quality, skills relevance, and reliability-related information. Rankings are advisory and depend on the available project and profile data.
